query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ai for auto-research: roadmap & user guide" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational methodology and canonical reference for the specific domain of "AI for Auto-Research" and automated literature synthesis, which is the core subject of the user's roadmap and user guide. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and technical framework for the "extending" phase of the user's research by offering a state-of-the-art multi-agent system that directly addresses the challenge of automated paper writing and literature review
